title: stevia pabloensis
intro: Stevia pabloensis is a rare species of stevia, a plant in the sunflower family, native to the Andes Mountains in South America, known for its sweet leaves that are 300 times sweeter than sugar. The medicinal properties of Stevia pabloensis include its ability to lower blood pressure and act as an anti-inflammatory, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Stevia pabloensis include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve blood sugar control, and reduce the risk of heart disease. Stevia pabloensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or extract, and is often used as a natural sweetener in place of refined sugars.
